name: Workflow B — Daily Market Intelligence Report

parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id,
  p.title,
  p.address,
  p.price,
  p.price_previous,
  p.tipologia,
  p.area_m2,
  p.concelho,
  p.zone,
  p.opportunity_score,
  p.days_on_market,
  p.created_at,
  CASE
    WHEN p.price_previous IS NOT NULL AND p.price_previous > p.price
    THEN ROUND(((p.price_previous - p.price) / p.price_previous * 100)::numeric, 1)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS price_reduction_pct
FROM market_properties p
WHERE p.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND p.status = 'active'
ORDER BY p.opportunity_score DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

SELECT
  p.id,
  p.title,
  p.address,
  p.price AS current_price,
  p.price_previous AS old_price,
  p.concelho,
  p.zone,
  p.tipologia,
  p.area_m2,
  p.days_on_market,
  p.opportunity_score,
  ROUND(((p.price_previous - p.price) / p.price_previous * 100)::numeric, 1) AS reduction_pct
FROM market_properties p
WHERE p.price_previous IS NOT NULL
  AND p.price < p.price_previous
  AND p.updated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND p.status = 'active'
ORDER BY reduction_pct DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT
  d.stage,
  COUNT(*) AS deal_count,
  SUM(d.property_price) AS total_value,
  SUM(d.property_price * (d.probability / 100.0) * 0.05) AS weighted_gci,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - d.stage_entered_at)) / 86400) AS avg_days_in_stage
FROM deals d
WHERE d.status = 'active'
GROUP BY d.stage
ORDER BY
  CASE d.stage
    WHEN 'lead' THEN 1
    WHEN 'qualificado' THEN 2
    WHEN 'visita_agendada' THEN 3
    WHEN 'visita_realizada' THEN 4
    WHEN 'proposta' THEN 5
    WHEN 'negociacao' THEN 6
    WHEN 'cpcv_assinado' THEN 7
    WHEN 'escritura' THEN 8
    ELSE 9
  END

SELECT
  d.id,
  c.full_name AS contact_name,
  c.phone,
  c.email,
  c.lead_score,
  d.stage,
  d.property_price,
  d.property_price * 0.05 AS potential_gci,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - a.created_at)) / 86400 AS days_since_last_activity
FROM deals d
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = d.contact_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT created_at FROM activities
  WHERE contact_id = d.contact_id
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) a ON TRUE
WHERE d.status = 'active'
  AND d.stage IN ('proposta', 'negociacao', 'cpcv_assinado')
  AND (a.created_at IS NULL OR a.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days')
ORDER BY d.property_price DESC
LIMIT 5

parameters.subject: Daily Brief — {{ $json.date_formatted }}
parameters.html:
Daily Intelligence Brief

{{ $json.date_formatted }} — Agency Group

Pipeline GCI Ponderado

Agency Group | AMI 22506 | Gerado automaticamente às 08:00

parameters.values: =workflow-b-daily-report,report_sent,={{ JSON.stringify({weighted_gci: $('Code — Formatar Report').item.json.totals.weighted_gci, at_risk: $('Code — Formatar Report').item.json.at_risk_count, new_properties: $('Code — Formatar Report').item.json.new_properties_count}) }},={{ new Date().toISOString() }}
